title: Replicate-sensitive backend boundary checks on MBPP+100

protocol.seed_policy: Pipeline seed labels are stochastic replicate labels because the seed is not passed into the vLLM OpenAI payload.

rows.role: Cleaner non-Qwen/non-DeepSeek instruct backend; modest-positive but noisy.
rows.boundary: Replicate-sensitive backend boundary evidence, not backend invariance or broad cross-backend claims.

rows.role: Completion-style serving boundary; positive after more replicates but prompt/backend mismatch remains.
rows.boundary: Serving-format boundary evidence, not a clean instruction-backend replication.
